sentence: 元帅向全体将士表示感谢。
pinyin: Yuánshuài xiàng quántǐ jiàngshì biǎoshì gǎnxiè.
english: The marshal expressed his gratitude to all the officers and soldiers.

sentence: 历史课讲到了法西斯主义的兴起。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dào le fǎxīsī zhǔyì de xīngqǐ.
english: The history class covered the rise of fascism.

meaning: 1. to call at; 2. to stop at; 3. berth
sentence: 轮渡在码头停靠了约二十分钟。
pinyin: Lúndù zài mǎtou tíngkào le yuē èrshí fēnzhōng.
english: The ferry stopped at the dock for about twenty minutes.

meaning: 1. strong card; 2. honor card (card games); 3. very popular or success
sentence: 她从来不喜欢买大牌手表。
pinyin: Tā cónglái bù xǐhuān mǎi dàpái shǒubiǎo.
english: She has never liked buying big-name brand watches.

sentence: 一艘护卫舰正在执行巡逻任务。
pinyin: Yì sōu hùwèijiàn zhèngzài zhíxíng xúnluó rènwu.
english: A frigate is currently carrying out a patrol mission.

sentence: 今天股市收盘时上涨了两个点。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔshì shōupán shí shàngzhǎng le liǎng gè diǎn.
english: The stock market rose two points at today's close.

sentence: 老人去世后被安葬在家乡。
pinyin: Lǎorén qùshì hòu bèi ānzàng zài jiāxiāng.
english: After the old man passed away, he was buried in his hometown.

sentence: 街角的杂货店每天早上六点开门。
pinyin: Jiējiǎo de záhuòdiàn měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn kāimén.
english: The grocery store on the corner opens at six every morning.

sentence: 这家工厂专门冶炼铜和铝。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng zhuānmén yěliàn tóng hé lǚ.
english: This factory specializes in smelting copper and aluminum.

meaning: 1. material for making clothes; 2. CL:塊|块[kuài]
sentence: 这件外套的面料非常柔软舒适。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào de miànliào fēicháng róuruǎn shūshì.
english: The fabric of this jacket is very soft and comfortable.

sentence: 大公司吞并了几家小型竞争对手。
pinyin: Dà gōngsī tūnbìng le jǐ jiā xiǎoxíng jìngzhēng duìshǒu.
english: The large company annexed several small competitors.

sentence: 政府努力提高全体市民的福祉。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ nǔlì tígāo quántǐ shìmín de fúzhǐ.
english: The government works hard to improve the well-being of all citizens.

sentence: 这是非官方的消息，请别转发。
pinyin: Zhè shì fēiguānfāng de xiāoxi, qǐng bié zhuǎnfā.
english: This is unofficial news; please don't share it.

meaning: 1. to be partial towards sth; 2. to favor; 3. to prefer; 4. preference
sentence: 他偏爱喝绿茶，不太喝咖啡。
pinyin: Tā piān'ài hē lǜchá, bú tài hē kāfēi.
english: He has a preference for green tea and rarely drinks coffee.

sentence: 我坐了一个半小时的地铁才到。
pinyin: Wǒ zuò le yí gè bàn xiǎoshí de dìtiě cái dào.
english: I had to take an hour and a half subway ride before I arrived.

sentence: 她每天下午泡一杯花茶放松一下。
pinyin: Tā měitiān xiàwǔ pào yì bēi huāchá fàngsōng yīxià.
english: She brews a cup of scented tea every afternoon to relax.

sentence: 这项任务的优先级最高。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng rènwù de yōu xiān jí zuì gāo.
english: This task has the highest priority level.

sentence: 他年资较深，所以工资比较高。
pinyin: Tā nián zī jiào shēn, suǒyǐ gōngzī bǐjiào gāo.
english: He has more seniority, so his salary is relatively high.

sentence: 学校正在为图书馆募款。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zhèngzài wèi túshūguǎn mù kuǎn.
english: The school is raising money for the library.

sentence: 这里发现了一处汉代墓葬。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ fāxiàn le yī chù Hàn dài mù zàng.
english: A Han dynasty tomb was discovered here.

sentence: 这次事故已上报给航空局调查。
pinyin: Zhè cì shìgù yǐ shàngbào gěi háng kōng jú diàochá.
english: This incident has been reported to the aviation agency for investigation.

sentence: 这个方案的实效还有待观察。
pinyin: Zhège fāng'àn de shí xiào hái yǒudài guānchá.
english: The practical effectiveness of this plan remains to be seen.

sentence: 这个地区以农林业为主。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yǐ nóng lín yè wéi zhǔ.
english: This region's economy is mainly based on agriculture and forestry.

meaning: to regard as the foremost; to name as a prime example; to implement fo
sentence: 说到川菜，首推麻婆豆腐。
pinyin: Shuō dào Chuāncài, shǒu tuī mápó dòufu.
english: When it comes to Sichuan cuisine, mapo tofu is the top recommendation.

sentence: 你可以在讨论区发帖提问。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ zài tǎo lùn qū fā tiē tí wèn.
english: You can post questions in the forum discussion area.

sentence: 这根电线的端子坏了，需要换新的。
pinyin: Zhè gēn diànxiàn de duān zi huài le, xūyào huàn xīn de.
english: The terminal on this wire is broken and needs to be replaced.

meaning: to control flow; to choke; weir valve; a throttle; a choke
sentence: 公司今年决定开源节流，削减开支。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián juédìng kāiyuán jié liú, xuējiǎn kāizhī.
english: The company decided this year to increase income and cut costs to reduce spending.

meaning: crown prince; heir of a noble house
sentence: 这部剧讲的是一个王国世子的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù jiǎng de shì yī gè wángguó shì zi de gùshi.
english: This drama tells the story of a kingdom's crown prince.

meaning: charm or grace (in poetry or art)
sentence: 她的书法作品很有神韵。
pinyin: Tā de shūfǎ zuòpǐn hěn yǒu shén yùn.
english: Her calligraphy works have a wonderful charm and grace.

sentence: 这种溶剂可以去除油漆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng róng jì kěyǐ qùchú yóuqī.
english: This solvent can remove paint.

sentence: 她在单项跳高比赛中得了第一。
pinyin: Tā zài dān xiàng tiàogāo bǐsài zhōng dé le dì yī.
english: She came in first in the single-item high jump competition.

meaning: to jump over; to skip (a step, chapter etc)
sentence: 我不喜欢这首歌，直接跳过吧。
pinyin: Wǒ bù xǐhuān zhè shǒu gē, zhíjiē tiào guò ba.
english: I don't like this song — just skip it.

meaning: to file an income tax return; to declare dutiable goods (at customs)
sentence: 每年四月我都要去报税。
pinyin: Měi nián sì yuè wǒ dōu yào qù bào shuì.
english: Every April I have to go file my income tax return.

sentence: 多运动对心血管健康很有好处。
pinyin: Duō yùndòng duì xīn xuè guǎn jiànkāng hěn yǒu hǎochù.
english: Exercising more is very beneficial for cardiovascular health.

sentence: 他是班里出了名的活宝，总能逗大家笑。
pinyin: Tā shì bān lǐ chū le míng de huó bǎo, zǒng néng dòu dàjiā xiào.
english: He's the class clown — he can always make everyone laugh.

sentence: 老师让我们写一篇短文介绍自己。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xiě yī piān duǎn wén jièshào zìjǐ.
english: The teacher asked us to write a short essay introducing ourselves.

meaning: positioned between (two parties); to mediate between
sentence: 他居间调解，帮助双方达成协议。
pinyin: Tā jū jiān tiáojiě, bāngzhù shuāngfāng dáchéng xiéyì.
english: He mediated between the two parties and helped them reach an agreement.

sentence: 父母要提醒孩子不要和陌生人裸聊。
pinyin: Fùmǔ yào tíxǐng háizi bù yào hé mòshēng rén luǒ liáo.
english: Parents should remind their children not to have naked video chats with strangers.

sentence: 这件事自有公论，不用争了。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì zì yǒu gōng lùn, bù yòng zhēng le.
english: Public opinion will sort this out — no need to argue.

sentence: 他在海事局工作了十年。
pinyin: Tā zài hǎi shì jú gōng zuò le shí nián.
english: He has worked at the maritime affairs bureau for ten years.

sentence: 他在剧中扮演了一个重要的脚色。
pinyin: Tā zài jù zhōng bàn yǎn le yī gè zhòng yào de jiǎo sè.
english: He played an important role in the play.

sentence: 村里新买了几台农机，省了不少人力。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ xīn mǎi le jǐ tái nóng jī, shěng le bù shǎo rén lì.
english: The village bought several new pieces of agricultural machinery, saving a lot of labor.

meaning: tolerance (allowed error); common difference (of an arithmetic series)
sentence: 这个零件的公差不能超过0.1毫米。
pinyin: Zhège líng jiàn de gōng chāi bù néng chāo guò líng diǎn yī háo mǐ.
english: The tolerance on this part cannot exceed 0.1 millimeters.

sentence: 警察记下了那辆车的号牌。
pinyin: Jǐng chá jì xià le nà liàng chē de hào pái.
english: The police wrote down the license plate of that car.

meaning: 1. brokerage; 2. a commission paid to a middleman; 3. euphemism for a
sentence: 那个采购员私下收了供应商的回扣，被公司开除了。
pinyin: Nàge cǎigòuyuán sīxià shōule gōngyìngshāng de huíkòu, bèi gōngsī kāichúle.
english: That purchasing agent secretly accepted kickbacks from a supplier and was fired.

sentence: 阳光照耀着整片麦田。
pinyin: Yángguāng zhàoyào zhe zhěng piàn màitián.
english: Sunlight shines over the entire wheat field.

meaning: 1. depth (from front to rear); 2. depth (into a territory); 3. span (o
sentence: 这片森林的纵深超过十公里。
pinyin: Zhè piàn sēn lín de zòng shēn chāo guò shí gōng lǐ.
english: The depth of this forest exceeds ten kilometers.

meaning: 1. to park (a car etc); 2. to moor (a boat etc); 3. to leave sth (in a
sentence: 这里禁止停放电动车，请移到指定区域。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ jìnzhǐ tíng fàng diàndòngchē, qǐng yí dào zhǐdìng qūyù.
english: Parking e-bikes here is prohibited; please move them to the designated area.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名歌星。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù mèng xiǎng chéng wéi yī míng gē xīng.
english: She has dreamed of becoming a famous singer since she was little.

meaning: 1. actually; 2. as it turns out; 3. indeed; 4. of course
sentence: 敢情你早就知道这件事了！
pinyin: Gǎnqíng nǐ zǎo jiù zhīdào zhè jiàn shì le!
english: So you already knew about this all along!
